rulings.Case Title: MINHALL, INC.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. RICHARD A. CHRISTENSEN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Assignment Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, Line 1. DEFENDANT RICHARD CHRISTENSEN, BDS COUTURE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For An Assignment Order DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to provide the Court with sufficient information to evaluate the factors under CCP 708.510(c)(2) and (4).= (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Lifting Stay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT PETER LOUIE, VIVIENNE LOUIE's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Lifting Stay Continued to March 2, 2017 to be heard by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: PORCIA'S, LLC ET AL VS. LYLE A OLDER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT BARBARA OLDER, DYER STICKNEY, LYLE OLDER's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend to allege specific facts sufficient to state a claim for punitive damages and attorney fees.. Motion is GRANTED As follows: (1) as to page 15, line 6 "malicious", page 18, lines 1-2 "for punitive damages pursuant to California Civil Code, Section 3294", and (2) as to page 18, lines 5-6: "For attorney fees and litigations costs pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 1021.5." = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN MANN ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MUATH ZGHOUL's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED as requested. Late-filed opposition in stricken. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: ISIDORA G. CERALDE ET AL VS. HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC, HSBC BANK USA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to March 14, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than February 28, 2017 each with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. NICHOLE THIERRY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 14, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT NICHOLE THIERRY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/NJL)
